issues.description: Card has two distinct effects ([On Play] and [When Attacking]) but effects array is empty. Both effects must be defined in DSL.
[On Play] effect missing: Should trigger on play, allow viewing 3 cards from top of deck, and allow placement at top or bottom in any order.
[When Attacking] effect missing: Should trigger on attack, reveal 1 card from top of deck, play up to 1 Character with cost 2 rested, and place remainder at top or bottom.

actions.description: Look at 3 cards from top of deck and arrange in any order at top or bottom
Reveal 1 card from top of deck
Play up to 1 Character card with cost 2 rested
